top_five.rationale: ISO 27001 + MOM- and ECDA-endorsed SG screening incumbent (400k+ checks); the brand SG HR directors already trust when they buy any reference product.
Owns the SG blue-collar / shift channel with 85k+ FastGig bookers; if FastJobs productises its no-show rating it cuts straight into our wedge.
Free, instant, and where SG F&B/security/MICE bosses actually swap names today; the buyer's real status-quo NBA we must displace.
MOM + SSG + Jobstreet-backed verified-credentials rail with state distribution; closest adjacency to a Lemon Score, could expand into reference attestations.
The real default at SG's ~300 licensed staffing agencies — internal blocklist Sheets shared across branches, free, and already inside the ATS workflow.

competitors.name: Sterling (a First Advantage company) Singapore
competitors.hq: New York, USA / Singapore office 100AM Tras St.
competitors.pricing_range_published: Per-check SGD 50–200+ basic, SGD 200–800 mid, SGD 1.5k–10k EDD; MOM Education Verification ~SGD 114
competitors.primary_value_prop: MOM-accredited global pre-employment screening; criminal, identity, education with Yoti digital ID.
strengths: Now owned by First Advantage post-2024 merger — combined ~USD 1B+ revenue
SG office on the ground at 100 Tras St.
weaknesses: 10–15 day turnaround per their FAQ — too slow for SG shift hiring
Custom enterprise pricing only; SME-hostile
Built for one-time pre-hire, not ongoing trait tracking

competitors.name: HireRight Singapore (APAC)
competitors.pricing_range_published: MOM Work Pass Verification SGD 114; enterprise contracts USD 17k+/yr typical (Vendr marketplace)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Pay-per-report global screening with MOM Work Pass Verification at SGD 114 in 5-15 days.
strengths: Acquired by General Atlantic + Stone Point 2018; ~USD 700M revenue scale
weaknesses: Per-report price model anchored to white-collar EP applicants — wrong shape for shift workers
5–15 day SLA per HireRight Singapore service page
No behavioural-trait or no-show tracking

competitors.name: Checkr
competitors.pricing_range_published: USD 29.99 Basic+, USD 54.99 Essential, USD 79.99 Pro per check (US tiers); international quote-based
competitors.primary_value_prop: Gig-economy native background-check API with the Uber/Lyft playbook for hourly hiring at scale.
strengths: USD 5B 2023 valuation; powers Uber/Lyft/Instacart hourly hiring
Best-in-class API-first model — the closest US analogue to our category
weaknesses: No SG entity, no MOM accreditation, no SGD billing
US criminal-record-centric — its core moat doesn't transfer
Designed for marketplace consumer-rider safety, not employer-side trait tracking

competitors.name: Veremark
competitors.pricing_range_published: Pay-as-you-go credit model: 70 credits/check for MOM Education Verification (1 credit = USD 1); platform free, flat fee per check
competitors.primary_value_prop: MOM-accredited PAYG background screening with a free platform and credit-based check pricing.
weaknesses: USD pricing, no native SGD billing
Pre-hire single-check workflow — no ongoing trait tracking
Education + identity centric; no behavioural reference layer

competitors.name: GoodHire
competitors.pricing_range_published: USD 29.99 Basic+, USD 54.99 Essential, USD 79.99 Professional per check
competitors.primary_value_prop: Self-serve background checks designed for US small businesses, starting at USD 29.99.
strengths: Lowest-friction SMB onboarding in the US category
weaknesses: US-only — no SG entity, no MOM accreditation
FCRA-centric workflow doesn't fit PDPA
Out of buyer reality for Lemon Man's ICP

competitors.name: Accurate Background (APAC)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Custom quote; SG ranges SGD 50-200 basic / SGD 200-800 mid / SGD 1.5k-10k EDD
competitors.primary_value_prop: Global enterprise screening across 195 countries with 24/7 multilingual support and 40+ candidate languages.
strengths: Acquired CareerBuilder Employment Screening 2023; enterprise scale
weaknesses: SG go-to-market quieter than Sterling/HireRight
Enterprise quote-based; SME-unfriendly
No behavioural/reference-trait layer

competitors.name: Cisive
competitors.pricing_range_published: Custom enterprise quote
competitors.primary_value_prop: Highly accurate enterprise background screening for regulated industries — 99.9994% accuracy claim.
strengths: PBSA-accredited; deep healthcare and financial vertical depth
weaknesses: US-centric; weak SG/SEA footprint
Enterprise-only pricing model
Adjacent to our shift-worker ICP

competitors.name: Onfido (Entrust IDV)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Custom; median annual spend ~USD 60k (Vendr); USD 6k–USD 945k/yr range
competitors.primary_value_prop: ID document + biometric verification API for KYC/KYB onboarding of users at internet scale.
weaknesses: Identity layer only — no reference/trait/no-show data
Designed for consumer KYC, not employer reference
Vendor-side, not employer-network

competitors.name: Persona (withpersona.com)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Custom quote; Vendr marketplace data shows mid-five-to-six-figure annual contracts
competitors.primary_value_prop: Configurable identity platform combining ID, biometrics, database checks, and watchlists.
weaknesses: Identity-only — no behavioural reference layer
No SG-localised package; PDPA not the default frame
Vendor-side onboarding, not employer-network

competitors.name: Sumsub Singapore
competitors.pricing_range_published: Pay-per-verification ~USD 1.50–4 typical band; enterprise tiered
competitors.primary_value_prop: All-in-one verification platform for KYC/KYB/AML with a localised SG compliance page.
strengths: G2 Top Pick 2025 in identity verification
weaknesses: Designed for customer KYC, not employee reference
Sells to compliance officers, not HR
No no-show/behavioural data primitive

competitors.name: IDfy
competitors.pricing_range_published: Enterprise quote-based; reported India per-check INR 50–500 depending on stack
competitors.primary_value_prop: 140+ onboarding + risk APIs covering employee background checks, KYC, KYB, and fraud signals.
strengths: Genuine APAC depth — operates across India/SEA/MENA
weaknesses: India-anchored brand; SG-side go-to-market light
API-first; lacks employer-network behavioural data
No native SGD billing surface

competitors.name: SpringVerify (Springworks)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Per-check fee, custom quote; first 5 checks free; reported INR 400–2000/check
competitors.primary_value_prop: Instant KYC via WhatsApp + 100+ HRIS integrations for fast SEA-friendly background checks.
strengths: Springworks family (HR tech) — installed base of SMB recruiters
WhatsApp-native flow fits SG SME shift hiring
weaknesses: India brand; SG-side trust signals thin
No MOM accreditation
No structured no-show / behavioural rail

competitors.name: RMI (Risk Management Intelligence)
competitors.pricing_range_published: MOM Verification SGD 100–200 typical; full screening package SGD 200–800/candidate per RMI 2026 pricing guide
competitors.primary_value_prop: MOM- and ECDA-endorsed Singapore background screening with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 and 400k+ checks delivered.
weaknesses: Project-shape engagements (days, not minutes)
Single-direction (employer-only); no bidirectional rail
No no-show / Q4-leave / suspicious-MC trait taxonomy

competitors.name: eeCheck / Asia Background Check
competitors.pricing_range_published: From SGD 95 base, package-dependent; MOM Verification reported SGD 95–150
competitors.primary_value_prop: Asia-anchored background screening firm covering 12+ jurisdictions with a consultative full-service model.
weaknesses: Smaller scale than RMI/Sterling
Project-shape, not subscription
No behavioural rail

competitors.name: First Advantage APAC
competitors.pricing_range_published: Custom enterprise quote; MOM Verification SGD 100–150 estimated
competitors.primary_value_prop: MOM-accredited education verifier and APAC-scale enterprise screening backed by Sterling acquisition.
weaknesses: Enterprise-only price model
Slow turnaround vs SG shift cadence
No reference-trait layer

competitors.name: SEEK Pass (Jobstreet × MOM × SSG)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free for job seekers; bundled into Jobstreet employer subscriptions
competitors.primary_value_prop: MOM + SSG-backed verified credential rail letting candidates share employment history and education with one click.
strengths: Integrated with Careers & Skills Passport — gov data rail
Jobstreet pre-2025 data: verified candidates 40% more likely shortlisted
weaknesses: Credentials only — no behavioural / no-show / reliability layer
Single-direction (worker → employer)
Bundled into Jobstreet — not a standalone B2B product

competitors.name: FastJobs + FastGig (FastCo)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free job seeker app; employer pay-per-post / subscription SGD 100–500+/mo typical
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore #1 non-executive job portal plus FastGig flexi-work app with 85,000+ gig bookers.
strengths: Owns SG blue-collar mindshare; SPH-backed brand
FastGig 85k+ gig bookings — already in our exact buyer surface
Multi-award winner including Best New Recruitment Solution
weaknesses: Currently no public worker-reliability rating product
Employer-facing FastGig ratings not surfaced as a network
Adjacent — channel, not reputation infrastructure

competitors.name: Workmate
competitors.pricing_range_published: Pay-per-shift; pricing custom by client; SaaS workforce-mgmt tier on top
competitors.primary_value_prop: Frontline workforce-mgmt platform using 50+ data points (supervisor ratings, attendance) to staff shifts.
strengths: Closest live product to Lemon Score concept (proprietary worker reliability ML)
Real SEA scale — Indonesia + Thailand depth
USD 5.2M Series A (2019 led by Atlas Ventures)
weaknesses: Closed-loop: ratings live inside Workmate's marketplace only — not portable across employers
Singapore-side presence light; SG SME does not default here
Pivoted toward SaaS WFM; reliability score is a feature, not the product

competitors.name: Sampingan
competitors.pricing_range_published: Pay-per-task / pay-per-worker; enterprise custom
competitors.primary_value_prop: Indonesian gig-worker marketplace covering 80 cities and 850,000+ workers in manpower, solutions, systems.
weaknesses: Indonesia-only — no SG entity
Walled-garden ratings, not portable
FMCG/logistics ICP, not F&B/security

competitors.name: Glints
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free job ads; TalentHub EOR pricing custom (mid-four-figure SGD/mo per hire)
competitors.primary_value_prop: SEA talent platform with 10M+ candidate pool, EOR, and HR-management overlay.
weaknesses: White-collar tech-skewed ICP — not shift workers
No public worker-reliability rating product
Adjacent — competes for HR budget, not for the same need

competitors.name: Talentvis
competitors.pricing_range_published: Placement fee 15-25% annual salary; temp markup 30-50%
competitors.primary_value_prop: APAC-wide staffing group with temp + contract + permanent placements across 10 sectors.
weaknesses: Service shape (people-based) — not a SaaS reputation rail
Internal candidate notes not shared with the market
Adjacent — they're a buyer of Lemon Man, not a competitor

competitors.name: RecruitFirst (HRnetGroup)
target_market: Temp + contract roles in finance, logistics, manufacturing, education
competitors.pricing_range_published: Placement fee 15-25%; temp markup 25-45%
competitors.primary_value_prop: SGX-listed HRnetGroup's temp/contract arm placing 11,000+ roles per year with digital onboarding.
strengths: SGX-listed parent (HRnetGroup) — strongest local public-co credibility
weaknesses: Service-shape; internal blocklists not productised
Margin model conflicts with shared-reputation transparency
Adjacent — channel partner not competitor

competitors.name: ShiftMatch (Humanforce)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Pay-as-you-go; per-shift fill fee, no platform subscription
competitors.primary_value_prop: Relief-pool management filling open shifts via internal + external contingent workers with 90% fill-rate claim.
weaknesses: AU-anchored, no SG entity
Fill-shift focus, not reputation infrastructure
Closed-loop ratings — non-portable

competitors.name: Helpling Singapore
competitors.pricing_range_published: Booking-based SGD 20–35/hr cleaner; caregiving SGD 28–45/hr
competitors.primary_value_prop: Marketplace for home cleaning + caregiving with cleaner ratings and customer feedback loops.
strengths: Worker rating is a live feedback rail
weaknesses: Closed-loop: ratings stay inside Helpling — non-portable to other employers
1.7-star PissedConsumer corner — reputation rail itself is contested
Wrong ICP (B2C domestic services) for Lemon Man's B2B shift sector

competitors.name: Industry WhatsApp / Telegram groups
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free
competitors.primary_value_prop: Sector WhatsApp/Telegram groups where bosses share 'are you a yes or no on [name]?' — the real default reference check.
strengths: Truly free + truly instant — beats any vendor on speed/cost
Already where SG sector decisions get made
Network effect: more bosses = more useful
weaknesses: Defamation + PDPA exposure: blacklisting via group chat illegal per SingaporeLegalAdvice analysis
Bias-uncorrected — single ex-employer can torpedo a worker
No appeal mechanism, no decay, no corroboration
Doesn't scale across silos (F&B group doesn't help logistics buyer)

competitors.name: Staffing-agency internal blocklists (Google Sheets / ATS notes)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free (bundled in existing ATS)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Internal candidate-blocklist Sheets shared across an agency's branches and senior consultants.
features: Often pinned in ATS candidate notes
strengths: Zero adoption friction — already in use
Senior consultants treat it as ground truth
weaknesses: Single-agency siloed — a candidate burned at Elitez is still fresh to Talentvis
PDPA exposure on disclosure to external clients (consent narrowly framed)
No corroboration, no decay, no appeal

competitors.name: Manual reference phone calls
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free (sunk hiring-manager time, ~30-60 min per candidate)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Calling 2–3 ex-employer references directly — the established Singapore norm pre-MAS regime.
strengths: Singapore norm: 2–3 references + 5-year employment verification standard
weaknesses: 30-60 min per candidate — does not scale to shift volume
Ex-employer increasingly refuses to comment (defamation fear post-MAS)
No audit trail; subject to recall bias
Bidirectional signal absent (worker can't counter)

competitors.name: LinkedIn DM-the-ex-manager referencing
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free; LinkedIn Premium SGD 39.99/mo if InMail used
competitors.primary_value_prop: Cold-DM the candidate's listed ex-manager on LinkedIn and ask off the record — modern soft reference.
features: Reaches managers who left the company
strengths: Reaches people no longer reachable via official channels
weaknesses: Doesn't work for shift workers — F&B servers + security guards rarely on LinkedIn
Off-the-record signal carries zero evidence weight
Bias toward white-collar; entirely absent from blue-collar SG

competitors.name: Credit Bureau Singapore (CBS)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Consumer credit report SGD 8 + GST; SGD 19.44 express; FI subscription bespoke
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore's MAS-regulated consumer credit bureau and the canonical precedent for 'rated by the bureau, not by you'.
strengths: Universal acceptance among SG retail banks
Worker-self-purchase pricing point (SGD 8) is a brand anchor
Bidirectional access — consumer can pull own report
Closest legitimate precedent for Lemon Man's pitch
weaknesses: Credit-only; doesn't touch behavioural/employment traits
MAS regulatory perimeter — not extensible by us without licensing
Banking-vertical only, not labour-vertical

competitors.name: MAS Mandatory Reference Check Regime
competitors.pricing_range_published: Compliance cost only (not a vendor); ~SGD 50–500 per hire internal effort
competitors.primary_value_prop: MAS-mandated employer-to-employer reference exchange to stop 'rolling bad apples'; live since Dec 2023.
features: Mandatory FI-to-FI reference check on senior + material-risk roles
strengths: Sets the regulatory and cultural template Lemon Man explicitly extends
Solves the 'rolling bad apples' framing publicly
Live since Dec 2023 with one-year transition — already operational
21-day reply window = direct precedent for Lemon Man's 21-day rule
weaknesses: FI-only; doesn't touch F&B/security/logistics
Senior + material-risk only; not entry-level shift workers
No central registry — every FI talks to every FI bilaterally

competitors.name: TAFEP + Workplace Fairness Act (WFA)
competitors.pricing_range_published: n/a (regulatory regime; admin penalties SGD 5k first / 10k repeat / SGD 50k–250k civil)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Tripartite fair-employment regime that constrains what trait data employers may use; WFA takes effect end-2027.
strengths: Tripartite-aligned (the brand Lemon Man aligns to)
WFA passed Jan 2025; effective late 2027 — material brand context
Forces employers to document decisions — boosts demand for Lemon Man-style evidence
weaknesses: Constrains what data Lemon Man can productise (no inferred protected characteristics)
Compliance overhead, not a competing product
Not a vendor; cannot be 'beaten'

competitors.name: SkillsFuture + WSQ infrastructure
competitors.pricing_range_published: SkillsFuture Credit SGD 500 base + Level-Up top-ups; WSQ course SGD 200-2000
competitors.primary_value_prop: National training credit + WSQ certification rail; underpins Lemon Man's score-reducer mechanic.
strengths: Underwrites Lemon Man's score-reducer mechanism (WSQ → score drop)
weaknesses: Training rail, not reputation rail — they don't compete on score
Adjacent infrastructure to plug into, not beat

competitors.name: NTUC LearningHub + CEI / AEAS
competitors.pricing_range_published: CEI Basic exam ~SGD 230; CEI KAH ~SGD 480 (NTUC LearningHub)
competitors.primary_value_prop: CEI exam administrator + AEAS industry association — the gateway controlling which agencies operate in Singapore.
strengths: Owns the EA distribution funnel (every agency staff certifies through here)
weaknesses: Training/cert focus; not a competing reputation product
Distribution partner more than competitor

competitors.name: IPC (Institutions of a Public Character) sector
competitors.pricing_range_published: Donations 2.5× tax-deductible (250%); volunteer hours track via SG Cares / Giving.sg
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG IPC network — certified volunteer hours + tax-deductible donations underwriting Lemon Score reducers.
strengths: Tax-deductible incentive aligned to score-reduce mechanism
weaknesses: Civic infrastructure, not a competitor
Coordination overhead to certify hours back to Lemon Score

competitors.name: Tech in Asia (placeholder — informational adjacency)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Pro subscription USD 30/mo; reports USD 500–1.5k
competitors.primary_value_prop: SPH-owned SG/Jakarta tech-news platform whose narrative coverage influences employer adoption of new HR rails.
weaknesses: Editorial-led; not a vendor
Instability post-2025 Indonesia wind-down + CEO/COO exit Mar 2026
Channel, not competitor

competitors.name: Yoti (Sterling partner)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Bundled into Sterling contracts; per-verification quote
competitors.primary_value_prop: Portable digital identity used by Sterling worldwide ex-US to speed background screening 4×.
weaknesses: Bundled with Sterling — buyer chooses Sterling, not Yoti standalone
Identity-only; no behavioural trait layer
Not buyer-facing in SG

competitors.name: Trulioo
competitors.pricing_range_published: Custom; per-verification typical USD 1–5 high-volume
competitors.primary_value_prop: Global identity verification across 195+ countries, 5B+ people; strong KYB business-verification depth.
weaknesses: Identity-only, no behavioural reference
Sells to compliance officers, not HR/ops
Not Singapore-localised
